title: Unique Party 20902 Paper Napkins-16.5 cm- LOL Surprise Party-Pack of 16, Multicolour
features: Pack of 16 LOL Surprise Party Napkins
Paper napkins measure 16.5 cm x 16.5 cm
Ideal for wiping spills at a LOL Surprise birthday party
Disposable napkins make cleaning up quick and easy

description: Get in on the surprise with our LOL Surprise Party Napkins! These colourful LOL Surprise paper napkins are 16.5 centimetres wide and feature the popular characters of Diva, Cosmic Queen and Funky QT. Our 2-ply paper napkins come in a pack of 16 - so there's plenty to go around the table at your child's LOL Surprise birthday party. Get a little outrageous with more of our matching LOL Surprise themed party supplies.
